Standard hex constants.extra_comment_As: Qd = U * As * F * delta_T_mean, 30kW = 4000 * As * 0.95 * 50 (tapwater)
Standard hex constants.comment_Kp_dp: Pressure loss coefficient [kg/m2], assume 35kPa dp, at 0.24 kg/s mflow because of max heat transfer tap water 30kW
Standard hex constants.comment_Kp: Proportional gain of the PI controller [-]
Standard hex constants.comment_Ki: Integral gain of the PI controller [-]
